sections.label: Verse 1
lines: "A zate khempeuh" in hih thu taangko un
Leitung khempeuhah hih thupha tung sak un
Mi na muh khempeuh hih nuam huai thu ko un

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Cihna thu a mual a guam va thawn sak un
Hong it i Pa in hong sam kik lam khialte

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Hong paite in zekai nading thu om lo
Lut theih lai in lut un, kong honsa'n om zo
Zeisu lo thumaan hinna lampi om lo

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: "A ut khempeuhte" thuciam a maantak hi
"A ut khempeuhte" thuciam a kip ding hi
